live-map: Live tab map view: green pins = caches, favorite-count badges, right-side tool stack (re-center, auto-refresh, map types, follow mode). Docs page: map.html hero shot.
map-cache-callout: Cache callout after tapping a pin: name, type icon, distance, TB/favorite counts, D/T dots, size, GC code. Tapping the callout opens details; the … button opens cache actions.
map-dropped-pin: Dropped pin after long-pressing an empty map spot: callout shows coordinates + elevation with a … menu.
dropped-pin-menu: Dropped-pin … menu: Create Offline Geocache, Save Location, Navigate to Location, Copy Coordinates, Remove. (In Navigate mode it also shows Set as Target.)
map-more-menu: Live map top-left … menu (bulk cache actions): Add to List, Highlight, Export GPX.
add-to-list-scope-menu: Add to List scope submenu from the map … menu: All Caches / Visible Caches / Highlighted Caches.
map-layers: Map Types panel (1/3): Pro Offline Maps (download entry + offline settings), Offline Maps section, Apple Maps variants (Standard, Muted, Satellite, Hybrid, Flyovers).
map-layers-2: Map Types panel (2/3): Google Maps (Standard, Satellite, Hybrid, Terrain), Open Maps (Open Street/Cycle), Arc GIS top.
map-longpress: OLD exploration shot of the map after a long-press — superseded by map-dropped-pin; probably delete.
dropped-pin-actions: OLD exploration shot — superseded by dropped-pin-menu; probably delete.
search-active: Live tab list with the search field active (Location / GC codes / coordinates placeholder + recents clock icon).
list-sort: Sort sheet from the cache list (up/down arrows button): Direction Asc/Desc + Sort Types (Date Found, Difficulty, Distance, Favorite %, FTF, GC Code, Highlight Color…). Same sheet is used in offline lists. Sections: Direction, Sort Types.
filters-main: Live Search Filtering screen (top): Disable Filtering master toggle, Search by Cache Name, Exclude My Finds/Hides, corrected-coordinate filters, Exclude Adventures Stages, cache type rows. Sections: Search by Cache Name.
filters-2: Filter screen (middle): Difficulty + Terrain range sliders, Search Radius, Favorites Minimum, Cache Placed/Published Date. Sections: Difficulty, Terrain, Search Radius, Favorites Minimum, Cache Placed Date, Cache Published Date.
filters-3: Filter screen (bottom): API Sorting option, Other toggles (Enabled Only etc.), States/Provinces + Country pickers, and Templates section (Current Template / Save New Template). Sections: Sorting, Other, Templates.
search-template-list: Search template picker (empty state, 'No templates were found') — templates save the whole live-search filter configuration for reuse.
cache-details: Geocache details (POPOS FIDI): header with name/placer/D-T/size, coordinates + distance, TB/favorite counts, rows to Description, Hint, Logs, Personal Note, Images, Attributes, Waypoints, Trackables; Log Geocache + navigate buttons pinned at bottom. You can tap the favorites count area to show the users who favorited the cache. You can also tap the cache icon to show the current users logs for this cache. you can also long press on the middle finds UI to show options for My Logs and Friends Logs. You can also long press on the cache code in the navigation title to copy it. You can also tap the coordinates to cycle through different types. Then long press to copy.
cache-details-more-menu: Cache details … menu: Refresh, Log a trackable, Highlight, Add Waypoint, Share, Export GPX, Find Caches Near This, View on geocaching.com.
add-to-list-menu: Cache details + menu: Add to List, Watch, Ignore.
add-to-list-picker: Add to List: list picker showing offline lists to add the cache to.
add-to-list-options: Add to List confirmation: shows how many geocaches will be saved offline, with options Download Images and Show in CarPlay.
cache-description: Cache description viewer (webview) with the Cachly Intelligence sparkle button (summarize description).
cache-logs: Cache Logs list: log type icon + date, finder name with find count, GSAK-style badges (Great Story/Helpful), photo counts.
cache-attributes: Attributes screen: plain-language list of cache attributes (Available at all Times, Stealth Required…).
cache-waypoints: Waypoints screen: Original Coordinates plus additional waypoints (stages) with per-stage descriptions and coordinates; + adds a waypoint.
waypoint-add: Add Waypoint screen: name/type, embedded coordinate picker, and Project Coordinate (distance + bearing from a point). Sections: Presets, Tools.
cache-additional-info: Additional Info screen: user found/DNF dates, name/code, county/state/country, elevation, premium/archived/available flags, type, date hidden and more.
corrected-coords-picker: Corrected Coordinates editor: Is Corrected Coordinate toggle, DDM coordinate picker, Presets (e.g. copy from waypoint), used to solve puzzles/multis. Sections: Presets, Tools.
coord-format-menu: Coordinate entry format menu (used across coordinate editors): DDM Picker, Degrees Decimal Minutes, Decimal Degrees, DMS, Plain Text, plus Current Location / Copy / Paste.
log-compose: Log Geocache screen: Send Log Now toggle, date/time, Log Type, per-user section (multi-user logging), Message, Favorite Cache, Save as Draft, Trackables. Sections: GC800FX - Multi-Cache, MrCachly.
log-type-picker: Log Type picker: Found it, Didn't find it, Write note, Reviewer/Owner Attention Requested.
log-message-editor: Log message editor: 5000-char counter and Cachly Intelligence sparkle button; supports text templates and keyword placeholders.
logs-main: Logs tab: chronological list of your own logs with cache name, log type, date, badges and photo counts.
pending-geocache-logs: Pending Geocache Logs with one saved (unsent) log. Logs wait here when composed with Send Log Now off or without connectivity.
pending-logs-menu: Pending Logs … menu: Select Logs, Export .txt File (field-notes backup), Delete All Pending Logs. (Ignore the *Dev* item — debug build only.)
pending-logs-select: Pending Logs select mode: checkboxes per log for bulk submit/delete.
pending-log-row-menu: Per-log … menu: Post Log, Edit, View Geocache, Delete.
pending-log-detail: Editing a pending log — same compose screen, reopened from Pending Logs via Edit.
lists-main: Lists tab, Offline segment (default): offline lists with count badge, name, created date. Segmented control at top switches Offline / Online / Trips.
lists-create-menu: Create List form opened from + on the Lists tab.
lists-create-offline: Create List (offline) form: title field and Show in CarPlay toggle.
lists-row-actions: Swipe-left on a list row: Delete.
offline-list: An offline list opened in Map mode — same map UI as Live but scoped to the list's caches.
offline-list-listview: Offline list in List mode: cache count heading, filter button, sortable rows.
offline-list-menu: Offline list … menu when the list is EMPTY: only Create Offline Geocache. Superseded by offline-list-manage-menu; maybe delete.
offline-list-manage-menu: Offline list … menu with caches: Create Offline Geocache, Add to List, Update Caches, Download Cache Images, Highlight, Export GPX, Delete Visible Caches.
create-geocache: Create Offline Geocache editor (top): Details (name, code, placed date, Found toggle), Description, Coordinates with DDM picker.
create-geocache-2: Create Offline Geocache (middle): Type picker, Difficulty and Terrain sliders, Size, Options.
create-geocache-3: Create Offline Geocache (bottom): remaining options (hint etc.) and save.
more-main: More tab (top): profile row with find count, Pending Geocache/Trackable Logs, Online Drafts, History, Friends, Settings, Downloads, Message Center. Sections: More.
friends: Friends list (requires friend authorizations on geocaching.com — a prompt explains this the first time).
downloads: Downloads: active/queued offline downloads (empty state here). Large cache/image/map downloads appear and can be stopped here. Sections: Downloads.
online-drafts: Online Drafts: drafts saved on geocaching.com (webview).
pocket-queries: Pocket Queries: your PQs from geocaching.com with cache counts and generation dates; tap to download into an offline list.
dt-grid: D/T Grid: 9x9 Difficulty/Terrain matrix of your finds — great for challenge caches.
saved-locations: Saved Locations list: name + coordinates, count badge; per-row … menu for Share / Copy Coordinates.
saved-location-row-menu: Saved location row … menu: Share, Copy Coordinates.
save-location: Save Location screen (from dropped-pin menu): name field + coordinate picker.
counties-regions: Counties / Regions (Pro): county-level find tracking; empty state prompts Import Data.
counties-import: Counties import source picker: Offline List, Dropbox, Google Drive, Files/iCloud, Other.
delorme-grid: DeLorme Grid (Pro): grid-page find tracking; same import flow as counties.
usage: Usage (top): Storage (cache images, offline maps, database, backups) and Database Objects counts (geocaches, logs, waypoints…). Tappable rows offer cleanup.
usage-2: Usage (bottom): remaining object counts + API Limits (lite/full geocache quotas remaining and reset timer). Sections: Usage, API Limits - Lite Geocaches, API Limits - Full Geocaches.
backups: Backups: create/restore Cachly database backups (also in iCloud).
help-support: Help & Support: searchable in-app documentation browser with categories (General FAQs, What's New, Cachly Pro, Getting Started, Features, Advanced).
docs-article-list: A help category's article list (General FAQs).
trackables-main: Trackables tab: your trackables inventory with names and codes; sort button top-right.
trackables-sort-menu: Trackables sort sheet: Direction + sort by Date of Last Log / Name.
trackable-details: Trackable details: name/type/release/distance, last-seen row, Description, Goal, Logs, Images, Additional Information.
trackable-details-menu: Trackable details … menu: View on geocaching.com.
tb-scanner: MISLABELED — this is just the Trackables root again; the scanner needs a manual screenshot from a real device (camera is black in the simulator). Replace this file.
profile-main: Profile: avatar + PREMIUM badge, rows for Finds, Hides, Logs, Trackables, Favorites (remaining/awarded), Souvenirs, Lists, Gallery, geocaching.com Profile, Project-GC Stats, Found Cache Types chart. Sections: Profile, Found Cache Types.
profile-finds: Finds opens a map of everything you've found.
profile-trackables: Profile > Trackables: your owned trackables grouped by type with counts.
profile-gallery: Gallery: photos from your logs, grouped by date.
settings-main: Settings root: Cachly Pro, Users, General, Map Options & Navigation, Caches & Waypoints, Logs, Templates, Proximity Alert, Trackables, Highlighting, Imports & Pocket Queries, Dark Mode, subscription management. Sections: Settings.
settings-users: Settings > Users with multiple accounts: Primary User (used for all of Cachly incl. searching), Other Users (zedsaid2, IndominusTrex — used for logging), and the Multi-User Logging toggle.
settings-general: Settings > General (1/4): Measurement (metric), rotation lock…. Sections: General, Measurement, iPhone Rotation Lock, TB Scanner, Offline Lists, Power & Battery, Default Coordinate Format.
settings-general-2: Settings > General (2/4). Sections: General, Power & Battery, Default Coordinate Format, Sorting, Other.
settings-general-3: Settings > General (3/4). Sections: General, Sorting, Other.
settings-general-4: Settings > General (4/4). Sections: General, Power & Battery, Default Coordinate Format, Sorting, Other.
settings-map-options: Settings > Map Options & Navigation (1/2): default map, navigation app choices…. Sections: Map Options & Navigation, World Landcover and Hillshades.
settings-map-options-2: Settings > Map Options & Navigation (2/2): World Landcover and Hillshades etc. Sections: Map Options & Navigation, World Landcover and Hillshades, Map API Keys.
settings-caches-waypoints: Settings > Caches & Waypoints (1/3): Pin Design, Live Search options…. Sections: Caches & Waypoints, Pin Design, Live Search, Clustering.
settings-caches-waypoints-2: Settings > Caches & Waypoints (2/3). Sections: Caches & Waypoints, Waypoints, Lonely Caches, Did Not Find (DNF), Found But Not Logged.
settings-caches-waypoints-3: Settings > Caches & Waypoints (3/3). Sections: Caches & Waypoints, Waypoints, Lonely Caches, Did Not Find (DNF), Found But Not Logged.
settings-logs: Settings > Logs: logging defaults (default log type, favorite prompts, drafts…). Sections: Logs, Logging Defaults, Display.
settings-templates: Settings > Templates: text templates for logs (auto-insert by log type).
settings-proximity: Settings > Proximity Alert (1/2): enable + distance/sound options. Sections: Proximity Alert, Enable Proximity Alert, Proximity Distance, Proximity Centering, Options.
settings-proximity-2: Settings > Proximity Alert (2/2). Sections: Proximity Alert, Proximity Centering, Options, Notification Sound, Permissions.
settings-trackables: Settings > Trackables: Automatically Visit and related options. Sections: Trackables, Automatically Visit.
settings-highlighting: Settings > Highlighting: manual sync, highlight labels/colors. Sections: Highlighting, Manually Sync, Remove Highlights, Options.
settings-imports-pq: Settings > Imports & Pocket Queries: import behavior, GSAK options. Sections: Imports & Pocket Queries, GSAK, Adventure Lab, Pocket Queries.
settings-dark-mode: Settings > Dark Mode: dark interface + dark maps options. Sections: Dark Mode, Dark Interface, Dark Map Styles.
settings-cachly-pro: Settings > Cachly Pro (1/2): Cachly Intelligence toggle and Pro feature settings. Sections: Cachly Pro, Cachly Intelligence, Pro Offline Maps, Automatically Add Finds.
settings-cachly-pro-2: Settings > Cachly Pro (2/2). Sections: Cachly Pro, Automatically Load Caches, CarPlay, Project GC.
01-login: OLD (used on getting-started.html) — replace during rewrite.
06-more: OLD (used on interface.html) — replace with more-main.
24-waypoints: OLD (used on waypoints.html) — replace with cache-waypoints.
31-trackables: OLD (used on trackables.html) — replace with trackables-main.
41-trackable-detail: OLD (used on trackables.html) — replace with trackable-details.
cache-hint: Hint screen: the owner's encrypted hint, decrypted for you. Row is grayed out on details when the cache has no hint.
cache-personal-note: Personal Note editor (2500-char limit): private notes synced to your geocaching.com account; imported notes can be kept/merged during GPX import.
cache-images: Images: photo grid from the cache listing and logs, grouped by date; tap for the fullscreen viewer with save/share.
cache-trackables: Trackables in this cache: trackables currently in the cache with last-seen info; tap for trackable details (grab/discover from the log flow).
offline-filter: Offline list filter root (filter button in list view): Disable Filters master toggle, List Filters (Add Filter — filters stack, multiple can be active), Filters Template (save/reuse filter sets). Different system from live-search filtering.
offline-filter-add: Create Filter step 1: choose the filter type.
offline-filter-types: Filter Type picker — many types (Attributes, County, Date Downloaded, Date Found By Me, Date Hidden day/month/year, Date Last Found/Updated, …). Full list enumerable from code; docs should list them in a table, no per-type screenshots needed.
offline-filter-config: Create Filter step 2 (Attributes example): type-specific Filter Details (attribute + AND/OR logic) and Advanced > Invert Filter (show everything EXCEPT the match).
offline-filter-templates: Offline filter templates picker (empty state): saved filter sets applicable to any offline list.
lists-online: Lists tab, Online segment: your geocaching.com lists (bookmark lists) with cache counts, including the Ignore List; per-row … menu; + creates an online list. Premium membership required.
lists-trips: Lists tab, Trips segment (car icon): trip lists for planning a route of caches (e.g. 'Trip To Seattle').
personal-note-editor: Personal Note editor with the + button at bottom left for attaching photos to the note.
personal-note-add-image: Personal Note + menu: 'Save photo to Personal Note' -> Choose from Library (Take Photo on a real device). Attached images are stored in iCloud and sync to all your devices. Note text itself syncs to geocaching.com; images are Cachly/iCloud only.
intelligence-settings: Cachly Intelligence settings (Settings > Cachly Pro): Enable toggle, AI Provider, and the three prompts — Log Summary, Description Summary, Log Writing. All three prompts are user-editable.
intelligence-ai-provider: AI Provider picker: Apple Intelligence (on-device, iOS 26 + supported device) or Claude / ChatGPT / Gemini (cloud, require an API key; usage may incur costs).
intelligence-log-summary-prompt: Log Summary Prompt editor — user-editable; the cache's logs are appended to the end of the prompt.
intelligence-log-writing-prompt: Log Writing Prompt editor — user-editable; cache info and the user's notes are appended to the prompt.
intelligence-log-summary: Sparkle button on a cache's Logs screen: Cachly Intelligence sheet with an on-device summary of recent logs.
intelligence-description-summary: Sparkle button on the cache description: summary of a long listing.
intelligence-log-writing: Sparkle in the log message editor: describe what to write, then Generate.
intelligence-log-writing-result: Generated log Preview with Insert / Try Again. Also works via voice in CarPlay for summarizing logs and descriptions.
02-map: OLD (used on map.html) — replace with live-map.
03-lists: OLD (used on lists.html) — replace with lists-main.
07-settings: OLD (used on settings.html) — replace with settings-main.
08-settings-users: OLD (used on settings.html) — replace with settings-users.
09-settings-general: OLD (used on settings.html) — replace with settings-general set.
10-settings-map: OLD (used on settings.html) — replace with settings-map-options set.
11-settings-caches: OLD (used on settings.html) — replace with settings-caches-waypoints set.
12-settings-proximity: OLD (used on settings.html) — replace with settings-proximity set.
20-offline-list: OLD (used on lists.html) — replace with offline-list.
22-list-view: OLD (used on lists.html) — replace with offline-list-listview.
23-geocache-detail: OLD (used on geocache-details.html) — replace with cache-details.
32-logs: OLD (used on logs.html) — replace with logs-main.
33-profile: OLD (used on profile.html) — replace with profile-main.
40-map-types: OLD (used on map.html) — replace with map-layers set.
counties-state: A state's county list: View All (opens the map), progress heading (36 of 58 - 22 missing), and per-county rows with find counts.
counties-map: View All county map: found counties shaded green, missing counties red — the challenge-caching overview at a glance.
counties-detail: Tapping a green county opens its panel: county name and a button to view the geocaches found there.
counties-detail-caches: The county's found caches shown on the map.
delorme-state: A state's DeLorme page list: View All plus per-page rows with find counts.
delorme-map: View All DeLorme map: the atlas page grid over the state, green pages found, red missing.
delorme-detail: Tapping a green grid cell opens its panel: page number and the geocaches found on that page.
map-layers-3: Map Types panel (3/3): Arc GIS (Satellite, Topo, Clarity, Nat Geo), USGS Topo, Ordnance Survey (UK) Street View, Custom Tile URLs (Add Custom Tile URL).
custom-tile-url-add: Add Custom Tile URL screen (Map Types > Custom Tile URLs): name + URL template in z/x/y format ({s} subdomains, {q}/{quadtree} for quadtree servers), TMS/Flipped Geometry toggle, Presets incl. UK OS Maps. Help article: help.cachly.com/article/38.
settings-users-menu: Per-user ... menu: Set as Primary, Text Templates (per-user), Auto-Visit Trackables, Delete.
settings-users-add: Adding a user: geocaching.com OAuth authorization page — each account signs in directly with Groundspeak; Cachly never sees the password.
log-compose-multi: Log compose with multi-user enabled: primary user section plus the Other Users heading.
log-compose-multi-2: Log compose scrolled: Other Users section listing zedsaid2 and IndominusTrex, each with an include checkmark.
log-compose-multi-expanded: An other-user section expanded: their own Message, Favorite Cache, Save as Draft, and Trackables — set independently per account.
search-history: Search history (clock icon by the Live search field): recent searches — coordinates, GC codes, places — tap to re-run.
